name: hydra_kll_test4
query:
INSERT INTO
    flink_output_table
SELECT
    gzip_compress(hydrakll_(concat_ws(';', labels.instance, labels.job, labels.label_0, labels.label_1, labels.label_2), value)) as precompute,
    1 as aggregation_id,
    '' as key,
    TUMBLE(INTERVAL '30 seconds') as window
FROM
    prometheus_8080_fake_metric_total
GROUP BY
    window, key
;
